listitem.para: Identify four common health problems among Irish Americans. Provide a recommendation to address each problem.
What are some childrearing practices common among the Irish?
How are emotions displayed among the traditional Irish?
Identify two high-risk behaviors common among the Irish. What health education would you provide to decrease these behaviors?
The family of a deceased patient invites you to a wake. What might you expect from a traditional wake?
What is the dominant religion among the Irish? How might you partner with the church to improve the health of the Irish?
Most Irish speak low-contexted English. What does this mean and how might it be displayed on an intake assessment?
Identify at least three common traditional health-care practices.
List at least three common traditional beliefs practiced by pregnant women.
Identify at least common health conditions among newborns. What health teaching would you do to decrease these conditions?
11. What are some cultural differences and challenges experienced by acculturated children and their Irish immigrant parents?
12. What treatment modalities are available for pregnant women at risk for alcoholism?
